manual_or_upload.label: WhatsApp chat export
manual_or_upload.description: Export one WhatsApp chat, then import the .txt file or the .zip from 'with media'. Repeat for each chat you want this WhatsApp source to cover.

acquisition_methods.label: Export one chat from WhatsApp
acquisition_methods.detail: Open the chat in WhatsApp, use Export chat, choose with or without media, then upload the .txt or .zip here.

acquisition_methods.label: Add another chat to the same source later
acquisition_methods.detail: WhatsApp exports are per-chat. Import more .txt or .zip exports in any order from the same source page; repeated exports are safe and keep their own coverage receipt.

acquisition_methods.label: Media folder sync
acquisition_methods.detail: Zip exports can include media files. This flow records media as present, but attaching media files to message records remains a separate future device-sync path.

manual_or_upload.help_text: WhatsApp does not expose personal messages through an account API or OAuth grant. This source imports owner-provided chat export files.
manual_or_upload.large_file_fallback: Start with one chat export. If a chat is too large for browser upload, use the server import-folder handoff for the .txt or .zip file.
validation_expectations: Duplicate, empty, unsupported, or too-large file status
Whether media files are absent, present in the zip, or not yet attached to records

refresh_policy.rationale: WhatsApp data comes from a manual chat export; refresh requires a new export.

display.label: Your WhatsApp chats
display.detail: Chat title (derived from export filename), participant list, message count, date range.

display.label: Your WhatsApp messages
display.detail: Author, timestamp, text content per message. Media attachments flagged but not stored.
